mechanism: Moral identity is treated as a single virtue score
possible_dampener: Distinguish internalization symbolization narrative integration action and repair

mechanism: Public moral display replaces concrete responsibility
possible_dampener: Test low-visibility action and recipient-centered conduct

mechanism: Moral self-image resists evidence of wrongdoing
possible_dampener: Build humility accountability and repair practices

mechanism: Prior good conduct excuses present harm
possible_dampener: Evaluate each action by consequence responsibility and repair

mechanism: Collective identity protects a moral narrative over truth
possible_dampener: Protect dissent public memory and affected-person testimony

mechanism: Professional or institutional role identity excuses harm
possible_dampener: Keep role morality answerable to broader ethical standards

mechanism: Failure becomes self-annihilation rather than responsibility
possible_dampener: Convert guilt into accountable action and repair

mechanism: Strong moral identity fails under pressure or weak regulation
possible_dampener: Use self-regulation practice role clarity and accountability supports

mechanism: Moral identity is built through contempt for outsiders
possible_dampener: Test identity through outgroup dignity and power awareness

mechanism: Institutions display values while rewarding contrary conduct
possible_dampener: Align incentives workload recognition and accountability with integrity
